entities.name: 护栏 (guardrails)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:部署在模型或系统外围的安全防线/过滤系统。基础模型自带的通用护栏在对抗性环境下非常脆弱,因此需要企业部署专门的定制化护栏。

entities.name: 致命三角 (lethal trifecta)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:由 Simon Wilson 提出的经典安全框架,指智能体同时具备(1)接收外部不可信数据、(2)访问内部私有信息、(3)对外发送数据能力,这三者交汇时便构成极高的风险。

evidence.quote: Have we covered all the elements of the lethal trifecta?

entities.name: 外星智能 (alien intelligence)
entities.how_described: 本集把 AI 的本质说成是一种绝对具有智能、但与人类截然不同形式的智能。人类会被低级的网络钓鱼骗到,而最先进的前沿模型有时会中极其荒谬的招数。

evidence.quote: But it'd be nice if I just had like a llama guard or whatever the I mean, so we develop.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: SOC 2
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:现有的合规行业标准(类似护照的最低要求),但目前尚未形成被监管机构普遍接受的成熟 AI 领域合规框架。

evidence.quote: So I think SOC 2 is not a great model, we'll just say, but it is a model.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

evidence.quote: would you want them to fully establish a SOC 2,
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: So SOC 2 is not legally binding in any sense, right?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: 思维链 (chain of thought)
entities.how_described: 本集提到它是模型思考的过程,嘉宾认为它在很大程度上(直到它们用数字思考前)是能相当好地反映模型内在意图的。

evidence.quote: there are lots of times where if you trust the chain of thought,
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

evidence.quote: which I tend to think chain of thought's pretty good.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00
